The Agenda

Copied

There are three months to go until the 2024 Paris Olympic Games are underway. Earlier, the International Olympic Committee unveiled its "AI agenda" for the games, which promises to be the most technologically-influenced event ever. Artificial intelligence has already more than made its mark in every industry and in all our lives and ahead of the Paris Olympics this summer, the world of sport is really getting its act in gear.

In this episode ofThe Agenda, Juliet Mann visits the Queen Elizabeth Olympic Park, home of the 2012 London Games, for the launch of the IOC's AI agenda. The president of the IOC Thomas Bach, IOC's Olympic Games Executive Director Christophe Dubi, former Olympic champion Nadia ComÄneci, and Professor of AI, Amit Joshi explain how AI could transform this year's Olympics.
